title: Visible Dripstone
description: Makes the tip of dripstone yellow so it's easier to see.
body:
This pack makes the tip of pointed dripstone bright yellow, making it much easier to see from a distance or in darker areas. Whether you're navigating caves, building traps, or just want better visibility, this simple visual tweak helps the dripstone stand out clearly without changing much.

**Subscribe to my YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/@OasisSucksAtMc?sub_confirmation=1
